cns_detail: in passive-CNS window (TPSA 21, MW 309, HBD 1, cLogP 4.4); Stage-3 Kp,uu still abstained

abstain_reasons: ["L0 routed to 'catecholaminergic_ADHD' but known mechanism is 'SSRI_serotonergic' - symptomatic prior withheld (structure/mechanism mismatch)", 'opens a plasticity window; durable benefit CONDITIONAL on paired training - abstain on standalone durability']

cns_detail: in passive-CNS window (TPSA 3, MW 187, HBD 0, cLogP 2.2); Stage-3 Kp,uu still abstained

abstain_reasons: ["L0 routed to 'catecholaminergic_ADHD' but known mechanism is 'MAO_B' - symptomatic prior withheld (structure/mechanism mismatch)"]
